staticText: Route-only Paystack merchant fee planner in native English, French and Hausa. The browser-local engine supports only the reviewed merchant-country and payment-channel combinations that its readable engine owns, locks currency to merchant country, and hard-blocks after its engine-owned review deadline. It never treats a fixed-fee waiver as a whole-fee waiver and infers fee tax only where the official pricing explicitly states that rates exclude tax. Monthly and target-net outputs are deterministic planning, not forecasts or quotes. Payout transfer fees, transfer duties, refunds, chargebacks, foreign exchange, custom or school pricing, terminal pricing, disputes and settlement timing are excluded. No widget, fee API, prefill, live quote or Paystack affiliation is supplied.
